w:r.w:t: Flutter App — Green + Orange Theme • Version 1.0
This color combination is specifically chosen for food-tech and tiffin delivery apps. It is used by leading food startups worldwide — and here is exactly why it works:
Fresh food, healthy meals, trust, nature, growth. Users associate green with freshness and reliability — perfect for a tiffin service.
Hunger, energy, warmth, speed, food delivery. Orange stimulates appetite and urgency — ideal for order CTAs and delivery status badges.
Cleanliness, hygiene, professionalism. White background makes the app feel like a real startup product, not a college project.
Authority, readability, professionalism. Used for all body text — far better than pure black (#000000), which looks harsh on screen.
Real companies like Swiggy, Zomato, and food-tech startups use exactly this warm+fresh color combination. Examiners recognize this pattern as professional and production-ready.
Below is every color token you need in your Flutter app. Copy these into your theme file.
Main brand color — AppBar, primary buttons, active tab, icons
CTA buttons, badges, price highlights, notification dots
All screen backgrounds, cards, modals, dialogs
All body text, headings, labels, input text
Success cards, delivery done chips, green input fills
Warning cards, pending order chips, highlight rows
Alternate row backgrounds, disabled field fills
Dividers, card borders, bottom nav background
Input borders, table lines, card outlines
Placeholder text, subtitles, helper text, timestamps
Error messages, delete button, failed delivery status
Confirmed payment, delivered status, active toggle
Create this file in lib/constants/app_colors.dart — copy exactly:
Every single UI element in your Flutter app and its exact color. Follow this table strictly for consistent design.
Use these font sizes and weights consistently across all screens in your Flutter app.
Background: #2ECC71 | Text: #FFFFFF | Border Radius: 8–12px | Height: 48–52dp | Font: Bold 16sp
Background: #F39C12 | Text: #FFFFFF | Border Radius: 8–12px | Height: 48–52dp | Font: Bold 16sp
Background: #E74C3C | Text: #FFFFFF | Use only for destructive actions
App Name Recommendation: TiffinCRM (Professional, memorable, describes the product)
BEST CHOICE — directly represents tiffin service. Use as app icon on green or white background.
Good alternative — shows fresh, healthy meals. Works great for meal subscription apps.
Good for delivery-focused apps — shows speed and delivery service.
Professional option — shows order management. Good for CRM-focused positioning.
Classic food icon — clean and recognizable. Use if targeting restaurant/mess operators.
Logo Font Recommendation: Use 'Poppins' (Bold) for TiffinCRM text and 'Poppins' (Regular) for the tagline. Poppins is a Google Font — free, modern, and widely used in Indian startup apps.
Quick reference for every major screen in your TiffinCRM Flutter app:
Background: Green #2ECC71 | Logo & App Name: White | Tagline: Light Green #D5F5E3
Background: White | Logo: Green | Input fields: White with gray border | Sign In button: Green | Links: Orange
AppBar: Green | Stats cards: White with light green/orange accents | Chart: Green bars | FAB: Orange
AppBar: Green | List background: White | Alternate rows: Light Gray | Status badges: per status color
AppBar: Green | Card: White | Price: Orange Bold | Status chip: per status | Action buttons: Green/Orange
AppBar: Green | Cards: White | Active indicator: Green dot | Subscription: Green badge
AppBar: Green | Form background: Light Gray | Fields: White | Save button: Green | Cancel: Outlined
AppBar: Green | Charts: Green primary, Orange secondary | Summary cards: White with colored accents
AppBar: Green | List tiles: White | Toggle switches: Green when ON | Section headers: Light Gray
Header: Green BG, White text | Active item: Light Green BG, Green text | Other items: White BG, Dark text
Use Green AppBar on all screens for consistency
Do not use orange as AppBar background — too intense
Use Orange only for CTAs and price amounts
Do not use too many colors — max 3 per screen
Keep backgrounds White or Light Gray only
Do not use dark background on list screens
Use Bold weight for all button text
Do not use thin/light weight on buttons
Keep font size minimum 14sp for body text
Do not use font size below 12sp anywhere
Use status colors from the badge table strictly
Do not invent new status colors inconsistently
Do not use heavy shadows — looks old-fashioned
Use Poppins or Roboto font throughout
Do not mix 3+ fonts in the app
Add border radius 8–12dp to all buttons and cards
Do not use sharp 0dp corners — looks unprofessional
Test all colors for readability at small sizes
Do not put white text on orange in small font sizes
🍱 TiffinCRM — Color Theme & Design System | Green #2ECC71 • Orange #F39C12 • White #FFFFFF
Manage Orders. Serve Better. • Flutter App Design Documentation
